description: Style Note Display your belief in fighting for justice with this joker T-shirt. Pair it with denims and arty canvas shoes. Product Details Blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and joker graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
